name: Deluxe Pork Chop Suey
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred pork into narrow strips and slice onion. Marinate both in soya sauce for 20 minutes. Meanwhile, slice all other ingredients and arrange on a platter, ready to cook. Assemble the cornstarch solution.
2. Place oil in a wok and turn the heat on. Heat the oil until it begins to smoke slightly. Add marinated pork and onions. Stir-fry about 2 minutes until the pork is browned. Place the wok cover over the pork and cook for an additional 3 minutes, ensuring the meat is thoroughly cooked. Uncover the wok and add bean sprouts and celery. Stir and cook for 2 minutes. Add all the remaining ingredients, adding salt and pepper to taste. Stir-fry thoroughly. Cover and cook for an additional 3 minutes. Uncover the wok and add the cornstarch solution. Ensure you stir the cornstarch solution thoroughly before adding it to the wok. Turn off the heat. Stir all food together. Serve over rice.
NOTE: Chicken, beef, veal, shrimps may be substituted for pork.
